howToApply: Uttar Pradesh Public Service Commission UPPSC Call For New Application for Uttar Pradesh UPPSC Staff Nurse Exam Recruitment 2023 Candidate Can Apply Between 21/08/2023 to 29/09/2023
It is mandatory to have OTR i.e. One Time Registration for UPPSC Recruitment
Pay attention, the registration number is received only after 72 hours of OTR registration – that’s why OTR should be done first and only then the application will be made
Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in Uttar Pradesh UPPSC Latest Staff Nurse (Male & Female) Examination 2023 / Recruitment 2023 – UP Government Jobs 2023
Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details
Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc
Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully
If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed
Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form
additionalData.one_time_registration: It is mandatory to have OTR i.e. for UPPSC Recruitment.

textSections.section: How to Fill : UPSSSC Technical Assistant Recruitment Online Form 2024
textSections.content: There are 02 types to apply online for UPSSSC Technical Assistant Group C Recruitment Advt No. 07-Exam/2024 Recruitment 2024. | First: In this, the candidate will have to login with his personal information, the information that has to be given is: PET Registration Number, Date of Birth, Gender, Domicile and Category. | Second : In this, the candidate will have to login through his OTP, the information that has to be given is: UPSSSC PET 2023 Registration Number and OTP Password. | After login, the complete information of the candidate, his photo and signature will also be visible, the candidate will have to fill the information related to the post he is asking for and the application fee: Rs.25/- will have to be paid. | Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. | Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. | Before Apply Online / Submit Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Colu

importantLinks.label: For T PET Notice / Candidate List

howToApply: There are 02 types to apply online for UPSSSC Technical Assistant Group C Recruitment Advt No. 07-Exam/2024 Recruitment 2024
First: In this, the candidate will have to login with his personal information, the information that has to be given is: PET Registration Number, Date of Birth, Gender, Domicile and Category
Second : In this, the candidate will have to login through his OTP, the information that has to be given is: UPSSSC PET 2023 Registration Number and OTP Password

After login, the complete information of the candidate, his photo and signature will also be visible, the candidate will have to fill the information related to the post he is asking for and the application fee: Rs.25/- will have to be paid
Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details
Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc
Before Apply Online / Submit Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully
Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form

jobs.title: CBSE Board Class 10th Results Declared, Class 12th Re-Evaluation / Verification Result 2026
jobs.shortInfo: Central Board of Secondary Education CBSE Central Board will soon release the results for the Class 10th Xth High School and Class 12th XIIth Intermediate Annual Board Exam 2026. The CBSE will declare the Secondary and Senior Secondary board Exam result April / May 2026. Candidates will be able to check their results/marks by entering their roll number on the official website. The official result date will be announced Soon. All registered students are advised to activate their DigiLocker accounts as soon as possible so that, once the results are released, they can receive their mark sheets and certificates in digital format via DigiLocker

importantLinks.label: Download 10th Second Board Exam Time Table

additionalData.step_1: The student will get the link to do DigiLocker Account Confirmation in the Some Useful Important Links section at the bottom of this page.
additionalData.step_2_t: o confirm DigiLocker Account, the student has to first select his class such as X or XII.
additionalData.step_3: After that the student has to enter the code of his school. If the school code is not known, then they can see it in their admit card.
additionalData.step_4: After that the student has to enter his/her board exam roll number.
additionalData.step_5: After that Enter 6 Digit PIN provided by your school.
additionalData.step_6: After that the candidate has to enter his mobile number.
additionalData.step_7: An OTP will be received on the mobile number given by the student, he will have to enter it.
additionalData.step_8: DigiLocker Account Confirmation process will be completed.
